description_long: This is a large, modern house with a flat roof and a sprawling, multi-wing layout. The structure features extensive use of large windows, creating a bright and open appearance, and several internal courtyards with visible palm trees. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. There are multiple entry points, including a prominent main entrance with a wide approach and a secondary entrance near a garage area. Outdoor spaces include a driveway, a pool area, and several terraces or patios. The house appears to be designed for luxury urban living, with ample space for both indoor and outdoor activities.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed house with expansive windows, internal courtyards, and multiple outdoor living areas. The design is open, bright, and emphasizes contemporary luxury.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, internal courtyards with palm trees, and a garage area to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, large window arrays, and a visible pool area at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view with a wide approach, symmetrical window placement, and visible terraces or patios.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, garage, and additional outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Wide main entry with steps, minimal overhang, and large glass doors; secondary entry near garage
